scripts.build: npm --workspace server run build && npm --workspace client run build
scripts.start: concurrently --names "server,client" --prefix name --prefix-colors green,blue "npm --workspace server run start" "npm --workspace client run start"
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "server,client" --prefix name --prefix-colors green,blue "npm --workspace server run dev" "npm --workspace client run dev"
scripts.lint: npm --workspace server run lint && npm --workspace client run lint
scripts.prettier: npm --workspace server run prettier && npm --workspace client run prettier
scripts.format: npm --workspace server run format && npm --workspace client run format
scripts.test: npm --workspace server run test && npm --workspace client run test
scripts.coverage: npm --workspace server run coverage && npm --workspace client run coverage
scripts.clean: npm --workspace server run clean && npm --workspace client run clean
scripts.clean:logs: npm --workspace server run clean:logs && npm --workspace client run clean:logs
